document_summary: Official certificate from the Digital Marketing Committee of China (DMCC) confirming Dehuan Liu served as Judge at the First China Digital Marketing Conference & China Digital Marketing Commendation Conference, held in Beijing in January 2016. Direct proof of Liu's judging role at a second major industry event.
